title: Dr.BAD [UPDATE V2]
body:
### **FEATURES** </details>

- **135Mods** ✔
- a LOT of content✔
- OPTIMIZED ✔
- Extremly Fun for Multiplayer Playthrough✔
- Includes mods like [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-tree-punching),[Cold Sweat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-sweat) And [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra),[Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism),[Create!](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)✔

This ModPack is VERY MUCH inspired by Dr.Stone in the future ill try to add more Dr.Stone Related Stuff like the medusa and i am gonna try making the progression a bit harder![the baner lol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9e59d87c79bc4d1ab9bb38008b5d76b2f80627b.png)

### WHAT CAN I DO IN THIS MODPACK ?
well you can
- make amazing Contraptions using Create mod And mekanism
- you can make a 100% WORKING plane/ship/car!
- you can immerse yourself into the Dr.Stone World!
- you are ABLE to go to THE SPACE using AD:Astra mod and its addons


### WHATS THE MAIN GOAL OF THIS MODPACK?

there is none. its up to you what you do its your playthrough that matters

NOT AFFILIATED WITH DR.STONE THE ANIME

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[This is my first modpack so there will be bugs in any case message me on discord (JUzefor)]
